columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) with high volume of disease (classified as "High-risk" using LATITUDE criteria) is reported in Table 1, under the "SOC + AAP" column, row "High-risk".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) with high volume of disease (classified as "High-risk" using LATITUDE criteria) is reported in Table 1, under the "SOC-alone" column, row "High-risk".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) with low volume of disease (classified as "Low-risk" using LATITUDE criteria) is reported in Table 1, under the "SOC-alone" column, row "Low-risk".
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | Low | Control
